name: pre-commit (Multi-language Git Hook Framework)

performance.notes: Runs configured hooks on staged files; parallel execution

agent_readiness.notes: Multi-language git hooks framework. pip install pre-commit. .pre-commit-config.yaml: repos: - repo: https://github.com/astral-sh/ruff-pre-commit rev: v0.3.0 hooks: - id: ruff - id: ruff-format. pre-commit install → installs git hooks. pre-commit run --all-files → run on everything. pre-commit run ruff → run specific hook. pre-commit autoupdate → update hook versions. pre-commit run --from-ref origin/main --to-ref HEAD. Languages: Python, Node, Ruby, Go, Rust, R, Docker, system. Hooks isolated in separate virtual envs. Popular hooks: ruff, black, mypy, prettier, eslint, hadolint, detect-secrets, check-json, check-yaml. CI: pre-commit run --all-files. SKIP=hook-id git commit to skip specific hook.

gotchas: First run slow — downloads and builds isolated hook envs
Hook envs cached in ~/.cache/pre-commit — can grow large
SKIP env var to bypass specific hooks; --no-verify for all
pre-commit autoupdate needed to keep hook versions current
Network required for first install of each hook repo
best_when: Multi-language projects needing consistent hooks across Python, JS, Rust, Go
Teams wanting a standard hook configuration checked into git
Projects using many different linters/formatters (ruff, prettier, mypy, etc.)
CI/CD validation matching local pre-commit checks
avoid_when: When hook network access restrictions apply
Very fast iteration needed (hook env creation adds latency)
summary: pre-commit is a multi-language git hooks framework. .pre-commit-config.yaml with repos + hooks. pre-commit install; pre-commit run --all-files. Hooks isolated in virtual envs. Supports Python, Node, Go, Rust, system hooks. Popular: ruff, black, prettier, mypy, detect-secrets. MIT by Anthony Sottile. First run slow (builds envs). pre-commit autoupdate for version updates. Best for polyglot projects. husky is simpler for Node-only.
